name: Subterror Behemoth Burrowing
name_jp: サブテラーマリスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>潜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>伏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぷく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can banish 1 "Subterror" monster from your Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, face-down monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, and your opponent cannot target them with card effects. If this card on the field is destroyed by a card effect: You can add 1 "Subterror" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 "Subterror" monster you control; change it to face-down Defense Position.
eff: You can banish 1 "Subterror" monster from your Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, face-down monsters you control cannot be destroyed by card effects, and your opponent cannot target them with card effects. If this card on the field is destroyed by a card effect: You can add 1 "Subterror" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 "Subterror" monster you control; change it to face-down Defense Position.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
